task_completion.description: Verify the entry of the Father's health condition.

task_completion.visual_evidence: The Family History table or summary view displays three distinct saved rows corresponding to the Mother (Diabetes), Father (Heart Attack), and Grandmother (Breast Cancer).

integrity.description: Verify that the agent is interacting with the OpenEMR web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser window with the OpenEMR application loaded, not a terminal or code editor.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent is entering data into form fields rather than pasting a text block into a notes field.
integrity.visual_evidence: The data appears in structured fields (Relative, Condition, Age/Date) rather than a single free-text block, unless the UI only supports free text.

integrity.description: Verify that the actions are performed within the application workflow.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the progression of adding entries (e.g., modals, 'Add' buttons, or form inputs) rather than the final state appearing instantly without navigation.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient: Philip Walker (DOB: 2015-07-04). Required Family History Entries: 1. Mother: Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus, Age 45. 2. Father: Myocardial Infarction (Heart Attack), Age 58. 3. Grandmother: Breast Cancer, Age 62.
